workspace_name: Anker AI-NPD Copilot 数据采集工作台

documents.title: 数据采集填写说明｜Anker AI-NPD Copilot
documents.purpose: Guide teammates on how to fill the five Feishu Base data intake tables.
documents.location_note: Created as a docx block inside the existing Feishu Base workspace.

documents.title: Proposal PRD｜跨平台 Dock 兼容预检助手
documents.purpose: Frozen proposal-stage PRD for the evidence-backed leading candidate, including scope, non-goals, proposed metrics, risks, validation, and pending confirmations.
documents.location_note: Created as a docx block inside the existing Feishu Base workspace.

tables.name: editorial_insights_cleaned
tables.purpose: Cleaned editorial-source-derived insights. These records are not direct user feedback or quotable user statements.

tables.name: verified_user_feedback
tables.purpose: Traceable public user-generated feedback summaries kept separate from editorial inference.

tables.name: pain_radar
tables.purpose: First-pass pain clusters derived only from approved public user-generated feedback, with confidence and sample-size warnings.

tables.name: capability_matrix
tables.purpose: Normalized Anker and competitor capability coverage. Feature presence is potential coverage, not proof that a pain point is resolved.

tables.name: opportunity_gaps
tables.purpose: Evidence-constrained opportunity gaps with overlap risk, confidence, recommendation, kill warnings, and next validation.

tables.name: candidate_pool
tables.purpose: Bounded Candidate NP hypotheses with evidence confidence, MVP boundaries, non-goals, entry decisions, risks, and next validation.

tables.name: stage_gate_evaluations
tables.purpose: Evidence-referenced six-gate evaluations for all three candidates, including status, score, confidence, reason, and decision impact.

tables.name: product_committee_reviews
tables.purpose: Six-role product committee review of the leading candidate with support, objections, confidence, actions, and confirmation triggers.

notes: Public manifest intentionally omits Base token and table IDs.
Resource identifiers, including Base table IDs and docx block identifiers, are stored in data_workbench/feishu_workspace_manifest.local.json, which is gitignored.
Use this Base for public sample evidence collection only; do not paste secrets, cookies, internal data, or personal authorization data.
